message: fix(ext4): propagate inode generation read failures (bd-o6zxp)

files.patch:
@@ -1077,6 +1077,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-o5114","title":"[HIGH] build_btrfs_image fixture omits default-root ROOT_ITEM for OpenOptions::default()","description":"# Review finding

`cargo test --workspace --all-targets` is still red in the basic btrfs smoke suite even after checksum stamping landed. The remaining failure shape is no longer CRC mismatch; it is `NotFound("btrfs ROOT_ITEM for default_root `default` (objectid 5)")` from `OpenFs::from_device(..., OpenOptions::default())`.

## Failed tests
- `tests::open_fs_from_btrfs_image`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_debug_format`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_superblock_accessor`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_walk_root_tree`

## Evidence
- Fixture builder: `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:22119-22204`
- It currently emits a single synthetic root-tree leaf entry with `objectid=256`, `item_type=ROOT_ITEM`, and 8 bytes of dummy payload.
- Current selection logic resolves `BtrfsMountSelection::DefaultRoot` to `BTRFS_FS_TREE_OBJECTID` (`objectid 5`) and requires a matching `ROOT_ITEM` before it can fall back to the superblock `root_dir_objectid`: `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:2395-2428`.
- Workspace repro still fails these four tests with the `NotFound` error after the checksum-only fix.

## Why this is high severity
This keeps the full workspace test gate red in the most basic btrfs `OpenFs` smoke path. It is a separate regression from the already-filed readdir checksum family.

## Repro
`rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenfs_cod cargo test --workspace --all-targets`

## Expected fix direction
Make `build_btrfs_image()` model the current default-root mount contract: include a `ROOT_ITEM` for `BTRFS_FS_TREE_OBJECTID` (objectid 5) with parseable enough payload for default-root resolution, or explicitly adjust the smoke tests to open a non-default root selection if that is the intended contract. Verify the four basic open/root-tree tests independently once fixed.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-22T11:33:41.432054034Z","created_by":"cod-fs","updated_at":"2026-04-22T12:06:38.071097190Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T12:06:38.069080484Z","close_reason":"Completed: build_btrfs_image now emits a parseable default-root ROOT_ITEM and the btrfs open smoke tests pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","ffs-core","fixtures","qa","review","workspace-gate"]}

 {"id":"bd-o6yp","title":"Harden ffs-inode: add edge-case and boundary tests","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-26T08:18:55.524679766Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T08:25:05.832029095Z","closed_at":"2026-02-26T08:25:05.832009869Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-o6zxp","title":"Propagate ext4 inode generation read failures","description":"Fresh-eyes ffs-inode finding: create_inode reads the old on-disk inode generation with dev.read_block(...).ok()? and falls back to generation 0 on any I/O error. That hides device failures and can mint a reused inode with an incorrect generation. Propagate the read failure while preserving zero fallback only for impossible/missing location metadata.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"cod-fs","created_at":"2026-04-27T08:24:54.071246701Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T08:29:55.450611504Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T08:29:55.448632194Z","close_reason":"create_inode now propagates inode-table read failures while reading old generation instead of coercing I/O errors to generation zero; added focused ffs-inode regression with an injected read failure. Validation passed: focused ffs-inode regression, fmt, diff-check, UBS touched file, workspace check, and workspace clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-o76","title":"btrfs: Implement initial read-only tree-walk (root -> items iterator)","description":"Goal: given a btrfs superblock and a logical->physical mapper, implement a minimal tree traversal that can enumerate items in a tree (starting with root tree).

Deliverables:
- Read root node at superblock.root (using mapper + BlockDevice).
- Descend internal nodes by key ranges until leaf.
- Iterate leaf items and expose (BtrfsKey, payload slice) to higher layers.

Acceptance:
- Can enumerate some items from a real btrfs image (fixture) without panics.
- Traversal is deterministic and fully bounds-checked.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T03:18:59.474306677Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T20:26:58.096706918Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T20:26:58.096682512Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-o76","depends_on_id":"bd-1fo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T03:19:11.552636857Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-o76","depends_on_id":"bd-kdk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T03:19:11.482040240Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-o7mp","title":"Add cargo-fuzz coverage for ext4 fast commit replay","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GreenKnoll","created_at":"2026-04-16T23:31:55.732016109Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-16T23:45:43.874693028Z","closed_at":"2026-04-16T23:45:43.870759916Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-o9bzg","title":"add ffs-core fuzz target for btrfs inode-ref payload parser","description":"Apply /testing-fuzzing to crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs::btrfs_parse_inode_ref_payload(payload: &[u8]). Scope: add a narrow high-throughput libFuzzer target over raw payload bytes, seeded with valid inode-ref encodings and truncated/overflowing name-length variants. Assert parser totality (no panics), bounded output growth, and round-trip compatibility with the serializer on successfully parsed cases where names are valid. Acceptance: new fuzz target registered in fuzz/Cargo.toml, corpus seeds/minimized regressions checked in, and parser invariants documented in the target comments or coverage notes.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T05:49:24.704304257Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-23T16:26:07.549378387Z","closed_at":"2026-04-23T16:26:07.547205058Z","close_reason":"Already implemented under fuzz/fuzz_targets/ (detect_filesystem/verify_ext4_integrity/btrfs_inode_ref_payload/path_component_validation).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","ffs-core","fuzz","parser","testing"]}
